2026-06-09.content:
Organization Policy Service custom constraints are
[generally available](https://cloud.google.com/products#product-launch-stages)
for Cloud Domains. For more information, see
[Use custom organization policies](https://docs.cloud.google.com/domains/docs/custom-constraints).

summary.title: Custom Organization Policies Now Available for Cloud Domains
summary.summary: Organization Policy Service custom constraints are now generally available for Cloud Domains. This feature allows for more granular control over your domain resources. You can learn more about how to use custom organization policies in our documentation.
